question: How many times has the U.N. General Assembly formally condemned the U.S. embargo on Cuba, and what was the level of international opposition in the 2014 vote?
answer: The U.N. General Assembly condemned the embargo 23 times, with 188 out of 193 member states opposing U.S. policy in the 2014 vote.

video: The U.N. General Assembly voted overwhelmingly for the 23rd time to condemn the decades-long U.S. economic embargo against Cuba.
text: The United Nations General Assembly voted to condemn the U.S. Cuba policy for 23 consecutive years, with 188 out of 193 member states opposing it in 2014.
